Name: Daizuki Single Zone Inverter Light Commercial Outdoor 12K BTU 25 SEER2 208-230V R410A
Description: This Light Commercial Single-Zone Outdoor Model from the DXLC Series features top of the line Full DC Inverter and Heat-Pump technology. It has 12,000 BTU in capacity, up to 24.60 SEER2 rating for high electrical efficiency, and runs on 208-230V/1Ph/60Hz. Plus, it is pre-charged with R410A; a nontoxic, nonflammable refrigerant which does not contribute to ozone depletion.
Meta: features:
Connect a single zone condenser with a versatile indoor system ranging from our high wall mounts, 4-way and 1-way cassettes, floor-ceiling units, fan coils, or air handlers. Experience the power of reliable, customizable comfort with Daizuki.

This Light Commercial Single-Zone Outdoor Model from the DXLC Series features top of the line Full DC Inverter and Heat-Pump technology. It has 12,000 BTU in capacity, up to 24.60 SEER2 rating for high electrical efficiency, and runs on 208-230V/1Ph/60Hz. Plus, it is pre-charged with R410A; a nontoxic, nonflammable refrigerant which does not contribute to ozone depletion.

To assure you of the highest quality standards, this product is AHRI Approved and UL Listed. Plus, thanks to its high energy efficiency, it is Energy Star certified. Consult your local laws for energy efficiency rebates and subsidies.

This Light Commercial Single-Zone Outdoor Model Features:

Diamond-Edged and T-Shaped Design. The Diamond-edged Casing, Archimedes screw-shaped air outlet and T-Shaped top cover together keep rain or sand away from the unit, ensuring stable operation of the interior.

Water and Fireproof Sealed E-box. The E-box is sealed with water & fireproof metal plate material and double-slot-tight buckles which serve as protection against rain or humidity and precaution for any possible leakage.

Smart Inverter. Can save energy while reaching the set temperature faster thanks to its advanced DC Inverter and DC Fan Motor technology.

Smart Troubleshooting. There is no time for downtime with Self-Diagnostic Programming and Refrigerant Leak Detection Sensor.

Winter Proof. This condenser can has a Low Outdoor Ambient Temperature Operation of -13ºF, has Intelligent Auto-Defrost Technology, and has a Built In Base Pan Heater.

Clean Effortlessly. Its intuitive cleaning design makes it simpler to take apart and reassemble. Filter, vanes, plate, and flap easily disassemble and fit back together for easy manual cleaning.

GoldFin Technology. Provides coil protection against corrosion in environments where traditional coatings fail.

Name: Growatt Inverter WIT 28K-HU-US L2
Description:
Power Without Compromise.
The Growatt WIT 28K-HU-US L2 is a next-generation hybrid inverter designed for demanding commercial applications, multi-tenant buildings, and advanced microgrid systems. With support for full battery backup, seamless UPS transfer, and massive scalability up to 165kW, the WIT 28K transforms traditional solar installations into intelligent, self-sustaining energy ecosystems.

\n

Whether your project demands black start capability, remote generator integration, or 100% unbalanced load support across 3 phases, this inverter is built to handle the most challenging power scenarios with ease. It delivers peace of mind through industry-leading safety, grid compliance, and monitoringwrapped in a rugged NEMA 4X/IP66 enclosure ready for the toughest environments.
Categories: Brands > Growatt, Solar Batteries, Solar Inverters
Meta: features:
Key Features

System Performance

  • 28kW nominal AC output / 33.6kVA apparent power

  • Maximum PV input: 54kW across 5 MPPTs, ideal for large, complex solar arrays

  • Battery-ready hybrid: DC-coupled lithium battery integration (380650V)

  • Max charge/discharge current: 79A (31.7kW)

  • Unbalanced 3-phase support: 100% phase-independent power delivery for critical loads

  • 110% continuous overload and black start/UPS capability (<16.6ms)

Connectivity & Integration

  • RS485/CAN for inverter-battery communication

  • Optional Wi-Fi, LAN, or 4G cloud connectivity with Growatt Smart Energy tools

  • Remote diesel generator control integration

  • Compatible with multi-source systems (PV + battery + genset + grid)

Protection & Compliance

  • AFCI (Arc Fault Circuit Interruption)

  • Anti-islanding, surge protection (Type II), ground fault, and PID protection

  • Battery reverse polarity, insulation resistance, and residual current monitoring

  • UL1741 SA/SB, IEEE1547.1:2020, CA Rule 21, HECO Rule 14, FCC Part 15, CSA C22.2 certified

Build & Design

  • Transformerless, natural convection + smart fan cooling

  • IP66 / NEMA 4X enclosure  outdoor-rated, corrosion resistant

  • OLED + LED display; mobile app monitoring

  • Operating range: -22°F to 140°F with derating >122°F

  • Max altitude: 4,000m (13,123 ft)

  • Weight: 153kg (337.3 lbs)

Ideal Use Cases

  • Small commercial solar + storage systems

  • Multi-family buildings with backup power needs

  • Agricultural or rural microgrids

  • Facilities with generator backup or limited grid availability

  • Large residential homes with high energy demands and three-phase power

Name: Trina Solar Vertex S+ N-Type i-TOPCon Dual Glass Monocrystalline Monofacial 450W Pallet (36)
Description:
Power Meets Elegance  The Future of Solar, On Your Roof
Step into a new era of solar innovation with the Trina Solar Vertex S+ N-Type i-TOPCon module  where cutting-edge engineering meets refined aesthetics. Designed for homeowners and businesses who demand both performance and style, this sleek, full-black panel transforms rooftops into high-yield energy powerhouses.

Harnessing the advanced N-Type i-TOPCon cell technology on a robust dual-glass platform, the Vertex S+ delivers up to 455W of clean, dependable power with an impressive 22.8% module efficiency. Every detail  from its compact, low-weight form factor to its industry-leading warranties  is engineered for effortless integration, maximum energy yield, and decades of reliable operation.

Whether its the perfect fit for your rooftop, the confidence of a 30-year power guarantee, or the peace of mind from superior weather and corrosion resistance, the Vertex S+ stands as more than a solar panel  its a long-term investment in energy independence. And with proven performance in low-light conditions and a reduced temperature coefficient, youll generate more power, even on cloudy days or in intense heat.

From its certified low carbon footprint to its compatibility with the latest inverters and mounting systems, the Vertex S+ doesnt just meet global sustainability standards  it helps set them. Its solar reimagined for the next 30 years of your life.
Meta: features:
Feature List

Performance & Efficiency

  • High Power Output: Up to 455W per panel.
  • Superior Module Efficiency: Up to 22.8% efficiency for maximum rooftop yield.
  • N-Type i-TOPCon Technology: Patented enhancements reduce contact resistance, boost rear reflection, and improve edge quality for ongoing efficiency gains.
  • Low Light Performance: Optimized for excellent energy production in low irradiation conditions.
  • Low Temperature Coefficient: -0.29%/°C ensures better performance in high heat.

Design & Installation

  • Full-Black Aesthetics: Elegant, uniform appearance for residential and commercial rooftops.

Durability & Reliability

  • High Mechanical Load Resistance: Withstands up to 5400 Pa front load and 4000 Pa back load.

  • Excellent Fire Rating & Weather Resistance.

Sustainability & Certifications

  • Certified Lifetime Carbon Footprint Assessment.
  • ISO 9001 / ISO 14001 / ISO 14064 / ISO 14025 / ISO 45001 Certified.

Name: NeoVolta NVPLUS 10.2 kWh Battery
Description:
NeoVolta NVPLUS 10.2 kWh Battery

The NVPLUS 10.2 kWh battery complements the NV7600 inverter as a durable, high-capacity energy storage solution engineered for longevity and safety. Constructed with Lithium Iron Phosphate (LFP) cellsrenowned for their thermal stability and non-toxic chemistryit delivers 9.2 kWh of usable energy at a 51.2 V nominal voltage. Its integrated BMS (Battery Management System) continuously monitors temperature, voltage, and current to ensure optimal charge balance and lifespan across thousands of cycles.

Each NVPLUS module can operate independently or in parallelup to 32 units, yielding an aggregate capacity of over 326 kWh. It supports 240 A peak discharge and 198 A maximum charge currents, enabling high-demand backup or load-shifting scenarios. Housed in a NEMA 3R (IP65)-rated casing for outdoor or indoor installation, the NVPLUS operates reliably from 4 °F to 131 °F and includes a 125 A four-pole DC breaker for additional protection.

Its compact 23.6 × 32.7 × 7.9 inches design and 107 lb weight make installation flexiblewall-mounted or floor-mountedwhile front-panel LED indicators communicate charge state and operating status. With a rated 6,000-cycle life (at 90 % depth of discharge) and 32 MWh energy throughput, the NVPLUS is built to endure more than 15 years of daily cycling

Name: NeoVolta Hybrid Inverter NV7600
Description:
NeoVolta NV7600 Hybrid Inverter

The NeoVolta NV7600 is a California-engineered hybrid inverter that unites power conversion intelligence with rugged, all-weather resilience. Designed for both on-grid and off-grid operation, it automatically manages energy flow between solar panels, batteries, the grid, and backup generatorsensuring seamless performance even during outages. Its 9.2 kW AC output and 16 kW DC solar input capacity give homeowners and small businesses a robust backbone for renewable energy independence.

Inside its NEMA 3R aluminum enclosure, the NV7600 integrates dual MPPT trackers (each handling up to 26 A) to optimize energy harvest under shifting sunlight. It maintains a 97.6 % peak efficiency with >99.9 % MPPT accuracy, translating to minimal loss and maximum yield. With the ability to parallel up to 16 units for 120/240 V systems (or 10 for 208 V three-phase), it scales easily from residential applications to light commercial installations.

NeoVoltas inverter architecture supports Lithium Iron Phosphate (LiFePO?) batteries, featuring a 4060 V range and 190 A charge/discharge current capability. Intelligent air cooling maintains performance from 40 °F to 140 °F, while a suite of embedded safety mechanismsovervoltage, short-circuit, ground-fault, thermal, islanding, and optional arc-fault protectionensures reliable, code-compliant operation. Communication ports (RS-485, RS-232, CAN) and integrated Wi-Fi/Ethernet/GPRS connectivity enable real-time system monitoring and remote diagnostics.

Certified under UL 9540, UL 1741 SB, and IEEE 1547, the NV7600 represents a 15-year commitment to safety, longevity, and performance
Meta: features:
System Integration Summary
  • The NV7600 Hybrid Inverter and NVPLUS Battery are UL 9540-certified as a paired energy-storage system.
  • The inverter automatically manages grid-tie, off-grid, and generator modes, providing seamless backup power.
  • The NVPLUS modules communicate directly over CAN for real-time BMS integration and safe charge/discharge control.
  • Each stack of 16 inverters × 32 batteries can scale to ? 2.4 MWh / ? 120 kW system capacity.

  • Use with incompatible or non-certified batteries;
  • Failure to follow installation and operational guidelines;
  • Operation beyond published environmental limits.

Name: NeoVolta NV14
Description:
NeoVolta NV14

The NeoVolta NV14 is designed for homeowners who want energy independence without compromise. Built around advanced lithium-iron-phosphate chemistry, the NV14 delivers clean, safe, and long-life storage for solar energy or backup power.
When the grid fails, it keeps essentials runninglights, refrigeration, HVAC, and communication systemswhile automatically recharging from solar during daylight hours.

Unlike typical lithium-ion systems, NeoVoltas high-capacity NV14 is engineered for 15 years of service and 6 000 + cycles, with minimal degradation. It integrates seamlessly with new or existing solar arrays and most inverter brands, providing flexible installation and reliable whole-home coverage.

The NV14 embodies California-built resilience: low maintenance, high safety, and real autonomy when you need it most.

Name: Talesun BIPRO Bifacial Dual Glass Mono N-Type 590W (36) Pallet
Description:
The Talesun BIPRO TM7G72M is a high-performance bifacial dual-glass solar module engineered for maximum energy yield and long-term reliability in utility-scale and commercial solar projects. Built with advanced N-type TOPCon cells and 16-busbar half-cut technology, this 144-cell module delivers superior efficiency, reduced degradation, and outstanding performance even in low-light conditions.

Thanks to its bifacial design, the TM7G72M captures sunlight from both the front and rear sides, enabling additional power gains of up to 25% depending on ground reflectivity (albedo). This significantly lowers the levelized cost of energy (LCOE) and maximizes return on investment.

The robust dual-glass construction, combined with excellent Anti-PID performance and an IP68-rated junction box, ensures durability in harsh environments, including high humidity, strong winds, and dusty locations. With a 12-year product warranty and an industry-leading 30-year linear power output guarantee, the BIPRO TM7G72M is designed for long-term, dependable operation.

Model#: TM7G72M590

Name: Daizuki 18,000 BTU Dual Zone Mini Split System with (2) 9,000 BTU 4-Way Ceiling Cassette Units
Description:
Model: DXFM-1823-2Z / DXCC09E426-20

This Flex-Mount Multi Zone Outdoor Model from the DXFM Series features top of the line Full DC Inverter and Heat-Pump technology. It has 18,000 BTU in capacity, up to 22.90 SEER2 rating for high electrical efficiency, and runs on 208-230V/1Ph/60Hz. Plus, it is pre-charged with R410A; a nontoxic, nonflammable refrigerant which does not contribute to ozone depletion.

This configuration includes two 9,000 BTU 4-way ceiling cassette units that mount flush into the ceiling and distribute air evenly in all directions for consistent room temperatures. Each zone operates independently, allowing personalized temperature control for maximum comfort and efficiency.

With high efficiency ratings up to 22.9 SEER2, low-ambient operation down to -13°F, and intelligent system protections like auto-defrost and refrigerant leak detection, this Daizuki Flex-Mount system delivers reliable year-round climate control.

Ideal for homes, offices, additions, or light commercial applications where ductwork is impractical.

The Ruixu RX-12K Split Phase Hybrid Inverter is a high-performance energy solution designed for residential solar + storage systems in North America. With 17.1kW PV input capacity, 11.4kW continuous output, and an integrated 200A transfer switch, this inverter delivers seamless whole-home backup and maximum energy independence.

Built for flexibility and reliability, the RX-12K integrates solar panels, battery storage, grid power, and generators into one intelligent systemideal for grid-tied or off-grid applications. Description:
The RUiXU Lithi2-16 is a powerful 16kWh LiFePO4 battery system engineered for reliable energy storage in residential and commercial applications. Designed with advanced safety features, long cycle life, and scalable architecture, this battery delivers dependable performance for solar + storage systems, backup power, and off-grid solutions.

\nWith 51.2V / 314Ah capacity, integrated self-heating technology, and expandability up to 257kWh, the Lithi2-16 is built for flexibility, durability, and long-term energy independence.

IP55 Perfect for outdoor applications This product is for both indoor or outdoor use. If installed outdoors, it is recommended to add arain shelter and a sunshade.  
ON-BOARD LCD TOUCH SCREEN
5-inch capacitive touch screen provides battery information and allows easy and intuitive adjustment of battery settings.
 
GAS AEROSOL FIREROOF MODULE
Gas Aerosol Fireroof module improves fire protection inside the battery pack to both electrical lines and cells.
 
QUICK PLUGS
Quick plugs provide 250A (continuous) overcurrent capacity, easy tool-less connection, long-term anti-loosening and heating protection.  
FUMA WHEELS AND WALL MOUNTED FIXATION
Four concealed heavy-duty Fuma wheels facilitate movement of the battery without detracting from the elegant design. An anti-tipping mount on the back anchors the battery to the wall.  
BATTERY MAINTENACE AND INSPECTION PORT
An inspection port on the side of the battery provides access to the BMS and fuse for ease of maintenance.  
ALL POLE PROTECTION
All-pole, dual protection through fuse (negative terminal) and micro circuit breaker (positive terminal).  
INTELLIGENT BALANCING
A double equilibrium approach achieves efficient cell balancing by calculating capacity differences between battery cells from charging-process data and by extending the balancing time, improving the efficiency and reliability compared to general passive and active balancing modes.  
SELF-HEATING FEATURE
Keeping your battery charged in cold temperatures .  
ELECTRO-COATING BATTERY CASE FOR OUTDOOR USE
Electro-coating (electrophoresis) of the battery enclosure provides excellent rust prevention for outdoor use.The electrophoretic coating process is widely used in the production of automotive body shells

Name: Trina Solar Vertex S+ N-Type i-TOPCon Dual Glass Monocrystalline Bifacial 440W Pallet (36)
Description:
Power Meets Elegance  The Future of Solar, On Your Roof
Step into a new era of solar innovation with the Trina Solar Vertex S+ N-Type i-TOPCon module  where cutting-edge engineering meets refined aesthetics. Designed for homeowners and businesses who demand both performance and style, this sleek, full-black panel transforms rooftops into high-yield energy powerhouses.

Harnessing the advanced N-Type i-TOPCon cell technology on a robust dual-glass platform, the Vertex S+ delivers up to 440W of clean, dependable power with an impressive 22.8% module efficiency. Every detail  from its compact, low-weight form factor to its industry-leading warranties  is engineered for effortless integration, maximum energy yield, and decades of reliable operation.

Whether its the perfect fit for your rooftop, the confidence of a 30-year power guarantee, or the peace of mind from superior weather and corrosion resistance, the Vertex S+ stands as more than a solar panel  its a long-term investment in energy independence. And with proven performance in low-light conditions and a reduced temperature coefficient, youll generate more power, even on cloudy days or in intense heat.

From its certified low carbon footprint to its compatibility with the latest inverters and mounting systems, the Vertex S+ doesnt just meet global sustainability standards  it helps set them. Its solar reimagined for the next 30 years of your life.
